Off Calendar Jun-01-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Nicholas A. Carlin, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff. Mark R. Carbone, Esq., appearing for Defendant. Defendant's Motion to continue Arbitration Hearing date, and extend the Arbitrator's jurisdiction is heard this day. After argument of respective counsel. Court ordered motion granted. Arbitration hearing is ordered vacated. The Arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 9/22/2006. Court ordered prevailing party to submit proposed order within five days. The Arbitration OSC is re-set to 10/19/2006 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Dave Davenport, CSR# 1694. (212)
